speaker: Interviewer
text: Where would you like to work?

speaker: Candidate
text: New York or remote. I could relocate anywhere in the US.

speaker: Interviewer
text: What are you targeting for compensation?

speaker: Candidate
text: A base between 180 and 210 thousand. Equity is separate.

speaker: Candidate
text: I am in two other processes, one at an onsite. I do not need sponsorship because I am a citizen.
